result:
Issues review complete. Both slices are S-sized, map to PRD promises (P1/P2, P2/P3), and have concrete, verifiable acceptance criteria using portable tooling (pytest, git).

**Findings**:
- ISS-1 (Review Tiny TDD Plan, P0/S): scoped to artifact review, names public-boundary test `test_slugify_label_normalizes_spaces_and_symbols`, three checkable criteria.
- ISS-2 (Execute Sandbox Implementation, P0/S): names exact file paths (`tests/test_slugify_label.py`, `sandbox_slug.py`), pytest command as public boundary, four objectively verifiable criteria including pytest pass and git-status receipt.

Both slices avoid external providers and fit a disposable git repo. Decision: accept.
